description.en: This function attempts to guess which of the several simple database modules available — dbm.sqlite3, dbm.gnu, dbm.ndbm, or dbm.dumb — should be used to open a given file. Return one of the following values: None if the file can’t be opened because it’s unreadable or doesn’t exist the empty string ('') if the file’s format can’t be guessed a string containing the required module name, such as 'dbm.ndbm' or 'dbm.gnu' Changed in version 3.11: filename accepts a path-like object.
